string.text: Crye Airframe Chops
Additional booking for the Airframe helmet, which protects the ear and the jaw area from fragmentation and small-caliber ricochets.
Multi-hit ballistic face shield-visor
Special high-strength ballistic visor, used by the special forces assault teams.
Ops-Core FAST Visor

FAST Visor designed to protect the eyes and part of the serviceman's face from shell fragments, mines, grenades, drops of chemically aggressive liquids and oils, coarsely dispersed aerosols, thermal factors, atmospheric influences and mechanical damages in all types of combat operations.
SLAAP armor Plate
Additional armor for the Ops-Core FAST helmet, made of a special polyethylene plate (5th protection class).
Altyn face shield
Special armored face shield for heavy helmet Altyn. Increases the chances of surviving the impacts of bullets and shrapnel.
Maska 1Sch face shield
Special faceshield for Maska 1Sch helmet
Ops-Core Fast GUNSIGHT Mandible
Special additional ballistic protection for the Ops-Core FAST helmet, mounted on the Side Armor component. (Fits LZSh light helmet aswell)
Tac-Kek Heavy Trooper mask
Tac-Kek Heavy Trooper, an additional helmet ballistic mask module based on the Ops Core type, based on the famous movie universe. This is the way.
GSSh-01 active headset
GSSh-01 headset is used in Russian Ratnik military gear set.
ZSh-1-2M face shield
%c[ui_gray_1]A special face shield for the ZSH-1-2M armored helmet. Made of heavy-duty materials.\n \n
Galvion Caiman Hybrid Ballistic Mandible Guard
%c[ui_gray_1]A special additional ballistic protection for the Caimain Hybrid helmet, mounted on the side rails. Manufactured by Galvion.\n \n
Galvion Caiman Hybrid Ballistic Applique
%c[ui_gray_1]An additional up-armor helmet shell attachment to elevate or enhance ballistic and fragmentation protection of the Caiman Hybrid Helmet. Manufactured by Galvion.\n \n
Galvion Caiman Fixed Arm Visor
%c[ui_gray_1]A locked-in ballistic visor shield for installation on the Caimain Hybrid helmet's shroud. Manufactured by Galvion.\n \n
Vulkan-5 helmet face shield
%c[ui_gray_1]A special armored face shield for the Vulkan-5 heavy helmet. Increases the chances of surviving the impacts of bullets and shrapnel.\n \n
Rys-T face shield
%c[ui_gray_1]A special armored face shield for the "Rys-T" heavy assault helmet. Increases the chances of surviving the impacts of bullets and shrapnel.\n \n
LShZ-2DTM face shield

%c[ui_gray_1]The protective structure of the bulletproof faceshield for the helmet LSHZ-2DTM consists of a combination of composite material and bulletproof glass, which provides increased protection.\n \n
LShZ-2DTM aventail
%c[ui_gray_1]An additional armored protection for lower back head part and neck for the LSHZ-2DTM helmet.\n \n
LShZ-2DTM aventail (Flora)
LShZ-2DTM cover (Flora)
%c[ui_gray_1]A flora anti-glare cover for the LShZ-2DTM helmet.\n \n
Crye Precision Airframe Tan

%c[ui_gray_1]The AirFrame ballistic helmet sets the standards in protection, comfort, and modularity. The unique overlapping shell design of the AirFrame creates an integrated vent that provides passive cooling and can reduce the damaging effects of explosive blast waves.\n \n
Altyn helmet

%c[ui_gray_1]"Altyn" passed real combat tests in Afghanistan and Chechnya and is still in service with the Ministry of Internal Affairs of the Russian Federation and the army special forces. The installation of an armored visor shield is possible.\n \n
Maska 1Sch helmet
%c[ui_gray_1]Protective helmet "Maska-1" appeared in service in 1991, as a replacement for the "Sphere" helmet.\n \n
LZSh light helmet
%c[ui_gray_1]Lightweight protective helmet made in Russia. In fact the copy of Ops-core Fast helmet, but with lower characteristics.\n \n
Tac-Kek Fast MT Helmet
%c[ui_gray_1]A non-ballistic replica of the Ops-Core Fast helmet from Tac-Kek. It can be modified by various components.\n \n
MSA Gallet TC 800 High Cut combat helmet
%c[ui_gray_1]Ballistic helmet MSA TC 800, designed for use by tactical teams of police special forces, in combat and reconnaissance operations. It can be modified by various components.\n \n
Ops-Core Fast MT SUPER HIGH CUT Helmet
%c[ui_gray_1]Ops-Core Fast ballistic helmet is popular in special forces all around the world. Can be modified with different components. Comes in black and tan.\n \n
Kiver-M Helmet
%c[ui_gray_1]Ballistic helmet.\n \n
Team Wendy EXFIL Ballistic Helmet
%c[ui_gray_1]One of the most recent tactical ballistic helmets with extensive customization capabilities. Comes in black and coyote tan.\n \n
NFM HJELM helmet
%c[ui_gray_1]The new-gen HJELM system applies new ideas for modularity of attachments and electronics without the extra weight and bulk of previous generations. Manufactured by NFM.\n \n
ZSh-1-2M helmet
ZSh-1-2M helmet (Black Cover)

%c[ui_gray_1]The ZSh-1-2M helmet consists of a durable alloy covered from the inside by aramid fabrics which does not allow penetration of the protective layer and absorbs the dynamic impact of bullets or shrapnel. Comes in olive drab and with a black cover.\n \n
Galvion Caiman Hybrid helmet

%c[ui_gray_1]The Caiman Hybrid helmet is a new generation of lightweight special forces helmet. A series of modular accessories enhances the package, providing users with lightweight, comfortable and maximum head protection. Manufactured by Galvion.\n \n
Vulkan-5 LShZ-5 bulletproof helmet

%c[ui_gray_1]The Vulkan-5 LShZ-5 high-level protection helmet is intended for use in a set of combat equipment with circular 6-class (Russian GOST) head protection from medium to heavy projectiles.\n \n
Rys-T bulletproof helmet

%c[ui_gray_1]The "Rys-T" ("Lynx-T") armored helmet is an improved and lightweight version of the famous "Altyn" helmet. It is in service with the assault units of the Ministry of Internal Affairs of Russia. Can be equipped with a special armored visor.\n \n
BNTI LShZ-2DTM helmet

%c[ui_gray_1]The LSHZ-2DTM helmet is intended for periodic wearing with the purpose of protection from bullets of small arms of a userвЂ™s head, as well as for protection from bullets of small arms of a userвЂ™s face and neck when equipeed with a visor and aventail.\n \n
BNTI LShZ-2DTM helmet (Flora Cover)
Unkown Brand Modular Backpack

%c[ui_gray_1]One of the most recent modular backpacks with extensive customization capabilities.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]CHARACTERISTICS:
 %c[d_blue] - %c[ui_gray_2] widespread use
 %c[d_blue] - %c[ui_gray_2] is used to store items
 %c[0,100,255,150] - %c[ui_gray_2] can be used as a stash
Unkown Brand Pouch for Modular Backpack
%c[ui_gray_1]Pouch for modular backpack that gives extra space to hold your stuff in backpack.\n \n
IOTV Gen4 body armor

%c[ui_gray_1]The Improved Outer Tactical Vest (IOTV) Gen IV is designed to permit maximum freedom of movement required to assume correct firing positions with the agility to execute and maneuver tasks. Optimal design characteristics ensure the best possible weight distribution of both the ballistic body armor system as well as additional load bearing equipment, thus providing enhanced comfort, wear duration, and mobility.\n \n
IOTV Gen4 body armor arms cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Arms cover for IOTV Gen4 body armor.\n \n
IOTV Gen4 body armor pelvis cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Pelvis cover for IOTV Gen4 body armor.\n \n
IOTV Gen4 body armor (Black)
IOTV Gen4 body armor black arms cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Black arms cover for IOTV Gen4 body armor.\n \n
IOTV Gen4 body armor black pelvis cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Black pelvis cover for IOTV Gen4 body armor.\n \n
FORT Redut-M body armor

%c[ui_gray_1]"Redut M" is a modified version of the Redut well-proven body armor, which is in service of special units of the FSB. The vest is based on advanced technologies in the field of individual armor. Due to the optimized form of armor elements and the outer cover with a special damping-ventilation system, the Redut M armored vest has excellent functional qualities, which facilitates active actions, including those associated with the use of vehicles and in confined spaces.\n \n
FORT Redut-M body armor arms cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Arms cover for FORT Redut-M body armor.\n \n
FORT Redut-M body armor pelvis cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Pelvis cover for FORT Redut-M body armor.\n \n
FORT Redut-M body armor pelvis and sides cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Pelvis and sides cover for FORT Redut-M body armor.\n \n
FORT Redut-M body armor sides cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Sides cover for FORT Redut-M body armor.\n \n
6B43 Zabralo-Sh body armor

%c[ui_gray_1]The 6B43 bulletproof vest is designed for protection from light weapon bullets - including BP and PP - fragments of grenades, mines, and melee weapons, as well as reducing the risk of after-penetration effects during combat situations.\n \n
6B43 Zabralo-Sh body armor arms cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Arms cover for 6B43 Zabralo-Sh body armor.\n \n
6B43 Zabralo-Sh body armor pelvis cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Pelvis cover for 6B43 Zabralo-Sh body armor.\n \n
NFM THOR Integrated Carrier body armor pelvis cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Pelvis cover for NFM THOR Integrated Carrier body armor.\n \n
NFM THOR Integrated Carrier body armor arms cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Arms cover for NFM THOR Integrated Carrier body armor.\n \n
NFM THOR Integrated Carrier body armor tan pelvis cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Tan pelvis cover for NFM THOR Integrated Carrier body armor.\n \n
NFM THOR Integrated Carrier body armor tan arms cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Tan arms cover for NFM THOR Integrated Carrier body armor.\n \n
NFM THOR Integrated Carrier body armor
%c[ui_gray_1]The THOR full protection assault body armor equipped with soft and hard armor elements to protect against shrapnel and bullets of pistol and rifle calibers. Manufactured by NFM.\n \n
NFM THOR Integrated Carrier body armor (TAN)
PARACLETE APC pelvis cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Pelvis cover for PARACLETE APC.\n \n
PARACLETE APC arms cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Arms cover for PARACLETE APC.\n \n
PARACLETE APC pelvis cover (Multicam)
%c[ui_gray_1]Multicam pelvis cover for PARACLETE APC.\n \n
PARACLETE APC arms cover (Multicam)
%c[ui_gray_1]Multicam arms cover for PARACLETE APC.\n \n
PARACLETE APC

%c[ui_gray_1]Designed to allow the operator to gain immediate protection against high powered assault weapons, the Advanced Plate Carrier (APC) takes performance to new levels. Blending the functionality of a tactical vest with the simplicity of a plate carrier, the APC accommodates soft ballistic panels, Level III or IV hard armor plates and equipment pouches.\n \n
PARACLETE APC (Multicam)
Shapeshifter helmet with face cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Legendary helmet with face cover.\n \n
Ars Arma A18 GOLIATH-G
%c[ui_gray_1]An armored vest highly modular for certain special operations. Manufactured by Ars Arma.\n \n
Ars Arma A18 GOLIATH-G arms cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Arms cover for Ars Arma A18 GOLIATH-G.\n \n
Ars Arma A18 GOLIATH-G pelvis cover
%c[ui_gray_1]Pelvis cover for Ars Arma A18 GOLIATH-G.\n \n
MCU-2/P protective mask
%c[ui_gray_1]The MCU-2/P is a protective mask used by the United States Air Force and United States Navy, originally designed for the US Army as the XM-30 mask.\n \n
Crye Precision Airframe Tan (MCU-2/P)
